feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Type "CMDS_KNZA_TU" is unknown in Class CMD_EI_API_CHECK
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are facing an issue where an object CMDS_KNZA_TU is missing in the system when we try to run Transaction Code XD02. I'm not sure if there is any SAP Note that could help this missing object. Any advice will be helpful! Thank you!

entry.title: Hi Guru's Help me on periodic billing plan Item net value 5000, can we split 48 months in Sales cont
entry.content:
In Sales contract: Periodic billing plan

For example item net value - 5000 ÷48 months= 104.16

5000÷24 months= 208.3

5000÷36 months= 138.8

Business wants  to show item net value and billing plan must be same.

Can we split into 2years (24 months), 3years (36 months), 4years ( 48 months)

If yes, pl. help me with configuration settings.

entry.title: Sap functional and excel edi mapping
entry.content: Hi everyone, functional SD/MM consultant here. I'm working for a integration project where we're integrating EDI messages. We prepared some excel mappings to send to PI consultant to make interfaces on PI side but he asked us to prepare an excel mapping with mapping rules that contain similar rules like the ones found in the screen. The problem is that we dont have PI structures of the EDI messages, do you know if i can get these somewhere or if i can get these from SAP ECC? Thanks

entry.title: Seeking an SAP Opportunity – Ready to Learn and Grow!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been actively searching for my first opportunity in the SAP world for quite some time. While I have some foundational experience across various modules—particularly in WM—I am eager to deepen my skills and grow within an international company.

Breaking into the SAP field without prior experience can be challenging, yet gaining that experience requires someone to take a chance on me. If you know of any junior-friendly opportunities or hiring processes, I would truly appreciate your guidance.

Thank you all in advance! Feel free to connect with me if you have any insights or leads.

entry.title: Planned Goods issue date in outbound delivery and Goods issue Date in Sales Order is different
entry.content:
Hello, 

Users reported 1 issue and I have recreated a test data in testing environment.

In SO1, sales order was created on Feb 18, 2025 at 13:17:37. Timezone is JST.

Pick/pack hours are set as 5 hrs.

Warehouse business hours are set between 8:00~18:00.

Transportatio plan. day is not defined.

Lodaing time is not defined.

Transit Time is defined as 1 business day.

 

In SO1, Material available date is Feb 18, 2025 and Goods Issue Date(Delivery Date) was proposed as Feb 19, 2025 because SAP has considered pick/pack hours and warehouse business hours.

Pick/pack hours will exceed warehouse business hours, so SAP has proposed Goods issue date(Delivery Date) as next business day.

This is understandable.

Then users have deleted Route in order to enforce delivery date as Feb 18, 2025, and sales order has been saved.

Another SO2 has been created almost the same time at Feb 18, 2025 at  13:38:00, which is almost the same timing as SO1.

Delivery schedule proposed was same as SO1 above. 

Material available date proposed was Feb 18 2025.

Goods issue date proposed was Feb 19, 2025.

Users have deleted route so that pick/pack hours are ignored.

Deleting Route enforced delivery date to be set as Feb 18, 2025.

For both SOs, outbound delivery have been created via t-cd VL10E.

Delv1  and Delv2.

In Delv1, Planned GI date was set as Feb 18, 2025, which is same as Goods issue date in Sales Order.

However, in Delv2, Planned GI date was set as Feb 19, 2025, which is different from Goods issue date in Sales Order.

In standard SAP, Goods issue date in Sales Order should have been proposed to Planned GI date in Outbound delivery document.

Since Route has been removed, pick/pack hours should be ignored in the system, so delivery schedule should be met.

(Material available date=Transport Plan. Date=Loading Date=Goods Issue Date(Delivery Date) )

Could help us to understand why Delv2 has Feb 19, 2025 in Planned GI was proposed in outbound delivery instead of Feb 18, 2025?

entry.title: Effort to implement document splitting
entry.content:
Good morning community, can you help me get a clear idea of ​​what requires less effort?

Effort to implement document splitting in a system already converted to S4Hana VS a system still in ERP.

Thank you!!

Francisco J. López

entry.title: Batch Jobs working on VA02
entry.content: How to find out the Batch Jobs working on VA02,VL02N and VF02 in SAP.

entry.title: Transaction Code CVI_PRECHK save button disabled
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question about t-code CVI_PRECHK.
Currently, I am unable to save any values in the "New Value" column. Somehow, the Save button is disabled. Pressing the "Enter" button saves the value in the column but it doesn't reflect when I run t-code XD02.

Is it a customizing issue or missing SAP note implementation? Any advice or opinions is much appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Syntax error in program SAPLCMD_BTE_OUTBOUND
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We are facing an issue where there is a syntax error in the program when we try to run Transaction Code XD02 as shown in the screenshot below. I'm not sure if there is any SAP Note that could help this syntax. Any advice will be helpful! Thank you!

Regards,
Sher Lynn

entry.title: How to add more than 1 email notification recipient in a job in SM37
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to add multiple email recipient inside the email notification section in a job in SM37. 

Is there a way to add more than 1 email recipient in the same job? Or there's a limitation for only 1 recipient?

Thanks

entry.title: Syntax error in program SAPLWR11
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm facing with this syntax errror in program SAPLWR11. This occurs when we try to run transaction XD02 and clicking save. I'm not sure which SAP note to implement to overcome this error. Any advice on how to solve this would be helpful! Thank you.

 

Regards,

Susan

entry.title: Condition Contract settlement in ERP - missing Standard customizing
entry.content:
Dear All,

It's about the setting for Condition Contract settlement in ERP with the version:

SAP_APPL 618 0022;  SAP_BASIS 750 0030).

we are missing a lot of standard setting like below listed. what could be the reason for the missing standard custmozing settings?

Standard Condition Tables:

4AB Condition Contract
4AM Condition Contract / Product Hierarchy 1 / PH2 / PH3
4AN Condition Contract / Material Group 1 / MG2 / MG3 / MG4 /MG5
4AO Condition Contract / Customer

Access Sequences:

RE01 Sales Rebate
REA1 Sales Rebate Accruals
RET1 Sales Rebate Tax
RET2 Sales Rebate Tax Trigger

Condition Types:

AS01 Tax Trigger

MWAS Output Tax
MWVS Input Tax
REA1 Rebate Accruals
REA2 Rebate Accruals Rev
REA5 Rebate AccrualsSettl
REBV Rebate Business Vol.
RED1 Rebate Accruals
RED2 Rebate Accr Total
RENT Rebate Net Amount
RES1 Rebate
RES2 Rebate PartSettl Rev
RETT Rebate Tax Trigger
RETX Rebate Tax

Standard Condition contract types: 

Basic scenario with a condition contract for one customer (0S01)
· Condition contract for multiple customers (0S02)
· Condition contract for one customer with a two-step settlement (0S03)
· Condition contract for multiple customers with a two-step settlement (0S04)
· Condition contract for one customer with goods-related rebate taxation (0SG1)
· Condition contract for multiple customer and goods-related rebate taxation (0SG2)
· Condition contract for one customer, goods-related taxation, 2Step settlement (0SG3)

Settlement Process Types: like 0S10 and more

Settlement Process Types / Payment Types in SAP ERP

Standard Settlement Document Type like 0S01;0S12 and more.

thanks a lot for your help

best regards Sophie

entry.title: Syntax error in program "SAPLWR11 "
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are facing an issue where there is a syntax error in the program when we click on Save in Transaction Code XD02 as shown in the screenshot below. I'm not sure if there is any SAP Note that could help this syntax. Any advice will be helpful! Thank you!

entry.title: Regarding product receipt and invoice processing
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a question about receiving the product and processing the receipt of the invoice.
It is calculated by quantity * unit price in KRW, but product receipt can be rounded up if the first decimal place is 6 or higher, and the amount is rounded up if the first decimal place is 5 or higher when the invoice is received.
Do I need to modify SAP settings?

I"ll be waiting for the reply.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to find Content Server data store
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have ECC 6 with EHP 7 SP12 system and one Content server (Database is MaxDB). 

All the PDF, JPG files are stored into Content server this is working since last 5 yeas, now we have a new requirement to store all other data also move to Content server, for that management is asking us, month wise how much data will be store into Content server and what will be size of each document.

 

We found the table TOA01 tables, which is show number of data store into Content server, but we are not able to find the size of the data. 

Please help us, is there any query in ECC end to get the data as well as size of each document. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: daily scheduled job for V_V2 assigns goods to sales orders
entry.content: The daily scheduled job for V_V2 sometimes assigns goods to sales orders that are actually not available (neither in stock nor with scheduled deliveries). If the availability check is manually performed on the individual impacted orders the next day, the assignment occurs correctly, but it is altered again with the nightly execution of the job. From the reports received, we have noticed that the codes involved are often linked to sales orders and intercompany OdTs at the same time. Furthermore, we have been told that the problem seems to resolve itself spontaneously after invoicing one of the sales orders involved. To temporarily manage the situation, we used the SDV03V01 and SDRQCR21 reports, which in most cases led to a realignment of the assignments.

entry.title: PROFIT CENTRE GROUP
entry.content:
Hi

Me again - I am trying to create a PC group, when I go to KCH1 it tells me object exists, in KCH2 I cant find it too and when I try to create it here it says function not allowed in standard hierarchy. Now, in KCH5N, when I try here, I am told it exists! Using the same TCode to look for the same group it can't be found!

Please assist, this is driving me nuts

Regards

James

entry.title: LV61A081 LV61A082 - pricing date vs billing date
entry.content:
Dear Collegue 

We have had a argentine customer claim for a customer invoice because it has wrong calculation of J1X1 Perception and J1A1 Perception. 
We have checked the cause: the requirements 81 and 82 where not fullfilled because the customer master tax grouping records ( table knat) was checked against the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) instead of the billing date ( komk-fkdat) 

In fact , we have found note 1747589 - 1256361 that applies a correction to formula 333 for using billing date instead of pricing date, but 
we have not found any note to be applied related to requirements 81 and 82 for correcting the way it access to table knat using billing date .
We attached the abap code for routines  81 and 82 were it is used the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) for table knat.  

Aditionally, J1X1 and J1A1 conditions are set as pricing date = billing date  in the sap standard ( T685A-KPRDT = C = billing date ) 

Someone had had the same problem? Did you find a solution with a SAP oss note?
We are willing to avoid to  copy the requeriments 81 and 82 to a custom solution to use billing date instead of pricing date , if there is a note to be applied. 

Also we find that in these routines it is not check standard localization table j_1at001tc where it is defined if the perception is active por the company code. 

It seems argentine localization requirements 81 and 82 are not as far as complete ...

Thanks in advance for your imputs
Viviana 

routine 81 - program LV61A081
* check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
      if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
         knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
         lv_subrc = 0.
      endif.

routine 82 - program LV61A082
 check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
    if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
       knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
      lv_subrc = 0.

entry.title: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: Is there a way or a table which I can find the program that is generating the emails being sent out in SOST?

entry.title: Priority for source of supply determination
entry.content:
I want to know if possible to configure a rule for prioritizing the source of supply of a purchase requisition. 

1) I have 2 vendors which have source lists, info record but the system proposes both of them in the source of supply. We run MRP and the systema assignes one info record, what is the logic behind the selection?



2) I want when running MRP, there is one being selected over the other one without having to "fix" the vendor in the source list.. is this possible? if I enter a "1" in field MRP in source list, how would the system determine the source of supply then? 

 

Vendor 1 has 16 days delivery time, price for material is 187.68 EUR

Vendor 2 has 10 days planned delivery time and price 188.36 EUR

None of them have and agreement in place.
